decks.notes: The deck aims to quickly set up a game-winning combination by playing Phyrexian Dreadnought and using Stifle to counter its own enters-the-battlefield effect, allowing the player to put a huge threat on the board for very little mana cost. The rest of the deck is dedicated to controlling the game with counterspells, card draw, and disruption, ensuring the combo can be successfully executed. This deck is focused on efficiently assembling its key combo pieces while disrupting opponents' strategies.

The main focus of this deck is to assemble the necessary pieces to generate a large amount of storm count using cards like Dream Halls and Show and Tell, and then finish the game with Brain Freeze. The deck utilizes various draw spells and cantrips to cycle through the deck quickly, while also including disruptive cards like Arcane Denial and Defense Grid to protect the combo. The mana base consists of lands that can generate significant amounts of mana quickly, allowing for explosive turns to storm off and win the game in a single turn.

The main concept of this deck is to utilize enchantresses to draw cards whenever you cast enchantments, while also using enchantments to control the board and create a win condition with Opalescence turning all enchantments into creatures. The deck focuses on ramping up mana through enchantments like Wild Growth and Serra's Sanctum, while utilizing cards like Parallax Wave and Seal of Cleansing for removal and disruption. The deck aims to set up a powerful board state and overwhelm the opponent with a combination of card draw, control, and creature beats.

The main focus of this deck is to control the game through a combination of counterspells, removal spells, and land destruction. By using cards like Mana Leak, Counterspell, Swords to Plowshares, and Wrath of God, the deck aims to control the opponent's board and prevent them from building up a threatening board presence. The deck also utilizes cards like Standstill and Fact or Fiction to draw cards and maintain card advantage. Additionally, the inclusion of land destruction cards like Dust Bowl and Powder Keg adds another layer of control by disrupting the opponent's mana base.

The deck focuses on controlling the game through counterspells, removal, and card advantage. It aims to stall the opponent by countering threats, removing their creatures, and generating card advantage through cards like Fact or Fiction and Stroke of Genius. The deck also utilizes land destruction with cards like Akroma's Vengeance and Tsabo's Web to disrupt the opponent's mana base. The win condition is through incremental advantage and card advantage, eventually overwhelming the opponent with larger threats and card advantage.

The deck focuses on quickly playing aggressive creatures like Mogg Fanatic and Jackal Pup, while maintaining card advantage with cards like Sylvan Library and Call of the Herd. Removal spells like Lightning Bolt and Incinerate help to clear the opponent's board. The deck also includes efficient creatures like Grim Lavamancer and Quirion Dryad to apply pressure. The mana base is designed to consistently have the necessary colors for spells, with a mix of fetch lands and dual lands. This deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with fast and efficient threats.

The main focus of this deck is to utilize the interaction between Phyrexian Dreadnought and Stifle to quickly assemble a powerful combo on the battlefield. By using cards like Flash of Insight, Opt, and Gush to dig through the deck, along with Counterspell and Foil to protect the combo, the goal is to get Phyrexian Dreadnought onto the battlefield with its enter the battlefield ability stifled. This will allow for a powerful creature to be put into play for a significantly lower cost, potentially overwhelming the opponent and securing victory.

The main idea of this deck is to quickly establish board control and apply pressure on the opponent by ramping up land destruction, while consistently generating threats on the battlefield. The deck aims to disrupt the opponent's game plan with cards like Wasteland and Armageddon, while utilizing aggressive creatures like Terravore and Call of the Herd to close out the game efficiently. The inclusion of cards like Sylvan Library and Weathered Wayfarer provide card advantage and mana fixing, allowing for a smooth gameplay experience with a focus on aggression and resource denial.

The deck focuses on quickly assembling the Phyrexian Dreadnought and Stifle combo, using cards like Opt, Impulse, Vision Charm, and Gush to search for the key pieces. The deck also includes a suite of counterspells like Counterspell and Foil to protect the combo from disruption. In addition, there are cantrips like Peek and Portent to dig deeper into the deck, while Misdirection and Thwart provide additional protection. The goal is to efficiently and effectively combo off while disrupting the opponent's game plan.

This deck focuses on quickly putting pressure on the opponent with aggressive creatures like Wild Mongrel, Basking Rootwalla, and Call of the Herd. The goal is to establish a fast clock and overwhelm the opponent before they have a chance to stabilize. The deck also includes removal and disruptive creatures like Mogg Fanatic and Nantuko Vigilante to disrupt the opponent's game plan. The mana base is optimized for consistent early game plays and the inclusion of Survival of the Fittest provides additional card selection and creature recursion.

The main concept of this deck is to control the game by using counterspells, removal spells, and various card draw abilities until it can assemble the combo of Oath of Druids and Treva's Ruins to win the game. The deck utilizes cards like Fact or Fiction, Impulse, and Deep Analysis to dig through the deck and find key pieces. It also includes cards like Wrath of God and Swords to Plowshares to deal with opposing threats. The deck focuses on creating a strong controlling position while setting up its win condition with Oath of Druids.

The key concept of this deck is to control the game by utilizing a combination of counterspells, removal, and land denial. By combining cards like Counterspell, Swords to Plowshares, Standstill, and Mishra's Factory, the deck aims to disrupt the opponent's strategy and maintain control of the battlefield. Additionally, the deck includes ways to generate card advantage through cards like Fact or Fiction and Impulse, allowing the player to outpace their opponent and secure victory through attrition. Overall, the deck focuses on efficient control and resource management to outplay the opponent.

The deck focuses on utilizing creatures and spells that allow for recursion, sacrifice, and tutoring in order to control the game and outvalue opponents. By utilizing cards like Survival of the Fittest and Recurring Nightmare, the player can constantly generate advantage and disrupt the opponent's game plan. The deck also includes a toolbox of creatures like Monk Realist, Uktabi Orangutan, and Mesmeric Fiend to deal with various threats. The goal is to establish board control and grind out a victory through attrition and efficient resource management.

The main concept of this deck is to quickly and aggressively deal damage to the opponent using cheap and efficient burn spells and creatures. The deck aims to control the board and finish the game as fast as possible by constantly applying pressure with burn spells like Lightning Bolt and Incinerate, along with creatures like Grim Lavamancer and Mogg Fanatic. The goal is to overwhelm the opponent with direct damage while also utilizing cards like Sulfuric Vortex and Ensnaring Bridge to disrupt their game plan and secure a win.

The deck focuses on controlling the game while utilizing Survival of the Fittest to search for essential creatures. It includes a variety of utility creatures and disruption spells to maintain board presence and disrupt the opponent's strategy. By using cards like Sylvan Library and Armageddon, the deck aims to control the flow of the game and outvalue the opponent over time. The inclusion of powerful creatures like Exalted Angel and Terravore provides additional win conditions, while cards like Swords to Plowshares offer removal options to deal with threats.

The main concept of this deck is to use enchantments to create a powerful engine that allows you to draw cards, ramp up your mana, and control the board. By utilizing Enchantress effects like Argothian Enchantress and Enchantress's Presence, you can quickly generate card advantage and overwhelm your opponent with a swarm of enchantments. Additionally, cards like Replenish and Opalescence provide powerful win conditions by either replenishing your enchantments or turning them into creatures to attack with. This deck aims to create a synergistic combo engine that is difficult for your opponent to disrupt.
